issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as detailed failure handling for worker agents.
The skill assumes specific agents (claude-code, openai-codex, gemini-cli, cursor), limiting cross-platform applicability.
No realistic examples are provided to illustrate the workflow.

scenarios.name: Migrate 200 files from Moment.js to date-fns across a monorepo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs the documented two-phase flow (parallel explorer analysis lanes, then dependency-aware plan, then worker packets with one-owner-per-file rule and packet-level validation gates); baseline jumps straight to codemods without the planning contract or ownership rules.

scenarios.name: Rename a public API across server, SDKs, and tests without breaking behavior
scenarios.rationale: Treatment respects the safety guardrails (no worker start before plan synthesis, no parallel edits on overlapping file sets, behavior-preserving by default) and sequences packets by dependency level with packet/integration/full-project check order; baseline parallelizes prematurely and skips the planning contract.
